name: Charmed
definition: While you have the Charmed condition, you experience the following effects.
full_text: While you have the Charmed condition, you experience the following effects. You can't attack the charmer or target the charmer with damaging abilities or magical effects. The charmer has Advantage on any ability check to interact with you socially.

effects.can_not_harm_charmer: You can't attack the charmer or target the charmer with damaging abilities or magical effects
effects.social_advantage: The charmer has Advantage on any ability check to interact with you socially
